description: Degraded fixture with blur, slight skew, and noise for OCR resilience and graceful-failure tests.

covers.frontend_upload: Verify the upload flow accepts a realistic but degraded PNG image.
covers.backend_ingest_and_preprocess: Verify the backend receives the file, preserves non-empty bytes, and does not crash when OCR quality is lower.
covers.ocr_extraction: Use subset assertions or confidence-based checks rather than exact full-text equality.
covers.processing_and_validation: Prefer asserting human-review behavior such as uncertain or partially missing fields instead of exact matches.

application_data.producer: Bottled by Old Tom Distillery, Frankfort, KY
application_data.government_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

expected_behavior.notes: This fixture is intended for resilience tests that prove the OCR pipeline degrades safely and surfaces review-needed output instead of failing hard.
